data.title: Raydium Unveils LaunchLab for Seamless Token Creation
data.description:
This platform aims to be a user-friendly, all-in-one token launchpad built for creators, traders, and developers. With LaunchLab, users can create and launch tokens directly on-chain. With no migration fees and instant liquidity migration once 85 SOL is raised
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/raydium-unveils-launchlab-for-seamless-token-creation/

data.title: Federal Reserve's Powell Highlights Stablecoin Regulation Needs Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description:
Powell's April 16 speech emphasizes stablecoin regulatory needs and market uncertainty, impacting digital asset valuations.
source: https://coincu.com/332685-powell-stablecoin-regulatory-needs

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 1,398 BTC from Kraken, about $118.3 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 35 minutes ago, a newly created wallet withdrew 1,398 BTC from Kraken, equivalent to approximately US$118.3 million.

data.title: Binance Launchpool Launches Initia (INIT) Mining
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the 68th Launchpool project Initia (INIT) at 00:00 (UTC) on April 18, 2025, supporting BNB, FDUSD and USDC mining for 6 days. Trading pairs such as INIT/USDT will be open for trading at 11:00 (UTC) on April 24, 2025. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: The Fed’s Worst Nightmare? Inflation and Recession at the Same Time
data.description:
Jerome Powell warned that President Trump’s new tariffs could force the central bank into a difficult policy dilemma, juggling rising inflation and slowing growth.

The post The Fed’s Worst Nightmare? Inflation and Recession at the Same Time first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/17/jerome-powell-deals-inflation-recession/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=jerome-powell-deals-inflation-recession

data.title: Whales withdraw 14,929 BTC from Babylon Labs
data.description:
Babylon Labs saw an outflow of non-custodial staking, with 14,929 BTC sent to external addresses.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whales-withdraw-14929-btc-from-babylon-labs/

data.title: LBank will launch Hyperlane (HYPER) pre-market trading
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank announcement shows that LBank will launch Hyperlane (HYPER) pre-market trading at 16:30 (SGT) on April 17, and open the HYPER/USDT trading pair. It is reported that the delivery of HYPER pre-market trading will be carried out at the official opening. LBank will redeem HYPER pre-market trading and official trading tokens 1:1, and promise that the withdrawal time of HYPER will not be later than other centralized exchanges in the market.
At the same time, in order to protect the interests of users to the greatest extent, LBank launched a price protection limited activity to provide all-round protection for HYPER spot pre-market trading. When the pre-market trading ends, if the price of HYPER held by the user is lower than the average pre-market trading price of the industry market, the loss caused by the price drop will be subsidized by LBank, up to 50USDT, and the subsidy will be issued to the user's spot account in the form of USDT within 3 days after the end of the pre-market trading.

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) Launches LEGO, TIME, MT and Other Tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) launched Solana and Base ecosystem's MEME tokens LEGO, TIME, mt, Defiant, Base is for everyone.
Bitget Chain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure chain trading experience. Users can directly use the spot account (USDT/USDC) in the Bitget App to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.
